window_summary: This window tracks the recent trpc/trpc release stream from v11.1.4 through v11.17.0, including a few v10 backports. The releases introduce features like lambda response streaming, localLink, OpenAPI support, and various fixes across client and server packages.

chunks.title: v11.1.4
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: trpc/trpc
Release: v11.1.4
Tag: v11.1.4; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-05-28T21:27:01Z; created_at: 2025-05-28T21:26:05Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
* fix(tanstack-react-query): skip inferring `initialData` by @KATT in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/6793
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/trpc/trpc/compare/v11.1.3...v11.1.4
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the trpc/trpc release v11.1.4, the release note describes a fix for tanstack-react-query that skips inferring `initialData`.

chunks.title: v11.2.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: trpc/trpc
Release: v11.2.0
Tag: v11.2.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-06-01T15:41:34Z; created_at: 2025-06-01T15:40:15Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
* feat(server): support lambda response streaming by @zirkelc in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/6680
* feat(server): add support for 402 http response status code by @alonzuman in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/6796
* fix(tanstack-react-query): `useSubscription` calls `onConnectionStateChange` by @darkobits in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/6797
## New Contributors
* @zirkelc made their first contribution in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/6680
* @alonzuman made their first contribution in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/6796
* @darkobits made their first contribution in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/6797
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/trpc/trpc/compare/v11.1.4...v11.2.0
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the trpc/trpc release v11.2.0, the release note adds server support for lambda response streaming, support for 402 HTTP response status code, and a fix for tanstack-react-query `useSubscription` calling `onConnectionStateChange`.

chunks.title: v11.4.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: trpc/trpc
Release: v11.4.0
Tag: v11.4.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-06-12T11:42:19Z; created_at: 2025-06-12T11:40:15Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
* chore: bump turbo by @KATT in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/6818
* Update wsLink.md (documentation) by @hmatthieu in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/6813
* refactor: swap rollup with native rolldown (using tsdown) by @juliusmarminge in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/6789
* chore: subtree should use `canary`-tag, not `next` by @KATT in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/6816
* patch(`client`): upgrade `localLink` from experimental -> `unstable` by @KATT in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/6817
* chore(www): fix link by @bene in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/6820
## New Contributors
* @bene made their first contribution in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/6820
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/trpc/trpc/compare/v11.3.1...v11.4.0
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the trpc/trpc release v11.4.0, the release note includes a turbo bump, a documentation update for wsLink, a refactor swapping rollup with native rolldown using tsdown, a subtree canary tag change, an upgrade of `localLink` from experimental to `unstable`, and a website link fix.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the trpc/trpc release v11.4.4, the release note adds TypeScript 5.9 support, fixes `httpBatchLink` with a custom transformed object at the top level, and resolves incompatible types in a monorepo due to separate `.d.ts` for ESM/CJS.

chunks.title: v11.10.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: trpc/trpc
Release: v11.10.0
Tag: v11.10.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-02-09T22:13:22Z; created_at: 2026-02-09T22:08:55Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
* fix(tanstack-react-query): mark react-dom as optional peer dependency by @bbinya1224 in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7108
* docs(docs): Add Nx Plugin for AWS to Awesome tRPC Collection by @cogwirrel in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/6965
* feat(client): return origin error in cause in localLink by @evolvomind in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7134
* fix(client): client connectionParams should respect specified encoder by @SirajChokshi in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7132
* docs: Add tRPC Docs Generator to extensions list by @liorcodev in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7122
* docs: document Fastify v5+ requirement for tRPC adapter by @tarunsinghofficial in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7109
* chore(docs): improve wording in docs by @sajadtorkamani in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7133
* fix(ci): allow backticks in semantic PR by @KATT in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7141
* feat(server): add `batchIndex` to procedures and middleware in batched requests by @anatolzak in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7097
* chore(www): update companies using by @KATT in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7145
* Improve layout control in CompaniesUsing component by @clicktodev in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7148
## New Contributors
* @bbinya1224 made their first contribution in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7108
* @cogwirrel made their first contribution in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/6965
* @evolvomind made their first contribution in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7134
* @liorcodev made their first contribution in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7122
* @tarunsinghofficial made their first contribution in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7109
* @sajadtorkamani made their first contribution in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7133
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/trpc/trpc/compare/v11.9.0...v11.10.0
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the trpc/trpc release v11.10.0, the release note marks react-dom as an optional peer dependency for tanstack-react-query, adds an Nx Plugin for AWS to the Awesome tRPC Collection, returns the origin error in cause in localLink, makes client connectionParams respect the specified encoder, adds a tRPC Docs Generator to extensions, documents Fastify v5+ requirement, improves docs wording, allows backticks in semantic PR, adds `batchIndex` to procedures and middleware in batched requests, updates companies using, and improves layout control in the CompaniesUsing component.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the trpc/trpc release v11.11.0, the release note fixes zod v4 zAsyncIterable generic order in the subscriptions guide, updates context documentation to remove a database reference, adds a note on tradeoffs for large clients in createContextInner, and exports types SubscriptionResolver and ResolverDef.

## What's Changed
* fix: correct typo 'commitedFiles' → 'committedFiles' by @mitre88 in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7221
* feat(docs): revamp docs content for 2026, more framework agnostic, improved Next.js docs by @Nick-Lucas in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7193
* feat: Support OpenAPI json generation for any tRPC appRouter by @Nick-Lucas in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7231
* feat: Fix some OpenAPI AI feedback by @Nick-Lucas in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7242
* feat: add `streamHeader` option to httpBatchStreamLink by @anatolzak in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7241
## New Contributors
* @mitre88 made their first contribution in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7221
* @pendant-k made their first contribution in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7236
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/trpc/trpc/compare/v11.12.0...v11.13.2
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the trpc/trpc release v11.13.2, the release note corrects a typo 'commitedFiles' to 'committedFiles', revamps docs content for 2026 to be more framework agnostic with improved Next.js docs, supports OpenAPI JSON generation for any tRPC appRouter, fixes some OpenAPI AI feedback, and adds a `streamHeader` option to httpBatchStreamLink.

chunks.title: v11.16.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: trpc/trpc
Release: v11.16.0
Tag: v11.16.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-03-28T10:24:00Z; created_at: 2026-03-28T10:18:57Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
* feat: OpenAPI Cyclic Types support by @Nick-Lucas in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7283
* chore: Review stale skills (manual) by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7294
### `@trpc/openapi` 11.16.0-alpha
* Drops the type depth limit of 20, and significantly hardens cyclic-type support for both inference and Zod
* Support zod.lazy via Standard Schema fallback
* Strip symbols from output (no more `__@asyncIterator@5456` symbols in output)
* Add more comprehensive types for the OpenAPI doc from the official package (now a dependency) and apply some patches to these types because they're slightly outdated
* Fixes several issues with gathering schema descriptions, such as consuming jsdoc comments from node_modules types
## New Contributors
* @github-actions[bot] made their first contribution in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7294
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/trpc/trpc/compare/v11.15.1...v11.16.0
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the trpc/trpc release v11.16.0, the release note adds OpenAPI Cyclic Types support, reviews stale skills, and for the @trpc/openapi 11.16.0-alpha drops the type depth limit of 20, hardens cyclic-type support, supports zod.lazy via Standard Schema fallback, strips symbols from output, adds more comprehensive OpenAPI doc types, and fixes several issues with gathering schema descriptions.

chunks.title: v11.17.0

Repository: trpc/trpc
Release: v11.17.0
Tag: v11.17.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-04-28T13:06:02Z; created_at: 2026-04-28T12:54:11Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
* chore(deps): bump next from 15.5.10 to 15.5.14 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7268
* chore: Review stale skills (v11.16.0) by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7295
* fix(server): unwrap error from cause for streaming onError by @zirkelc in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7286
* chore: Add cache checks for openapi router fixtures by @Nick-Lucas in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7296
* chore: Update Hey API for new type imports by @Nick-Lucas in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7298
* docs: Add oasdiff docs to openapi by @Nick-Lucas in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7299
* feat: Add subscription inferrence helpers by @Nick-Lucas in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7303
* fix(www): Add accessible text to links without discernible text by @cyphercodes in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7302
* fix(deps): update dependency @tanstack/intent to ^0.0.27 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7309
* fix(deps): update dependency srvx to v0.11.14 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7310
* chore(deps): update dependency @oxc-project/runtime to v0.123.0 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7311
* fix(deps): update dependency @clack/prompts to v1.2.0 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7312
* chore(deps): bump fastify from 5.8.1 to 5.8.3 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7288
* chore(deps): update codecov/codecov-action action to v6 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7313
* fix(deps): update dependency eslint-plugin-unicorn to v64 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7314
* fix(deps): update dependency undici to v8 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7316
* chore(monorepo): remove versions from private workspaces by @KATT in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7306
* fix(server): handle React 19 proxy coercion in createInnerProxy by @DORI2001 in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7336
* docs: add trpc-studio to awesome-trpc extensions by @sayefdeen in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7340
* chore: upgrade pnpm to 10.33.1 by @KATT in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7350
* build: upgrade drizzle in next-sse-chat example by @KATT in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7351
* chore(www): Add Legora to website logos by @KATT in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7358
## New Contributors
* @cyphercodes made their first contribution in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7302
* @DORI2001 made their first contribution in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7336
* @sayefdeen made their first contribution in https://github.com/trpc/trpc/pull/7340
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/trpc/trpc/compare/v11.16.0...v11.17.0
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the trpc/trpc release v11.17.0, the release note bumps next from 15.5.10 to 15.5.14, reviews stale skills, unwraps error from cause for streaming onError, adds cache checks for openapi router fixtures, updates Hey API for new type imports, adds oasdiff docs to openapi, adds subscription inference helpers, adds accessible text to links without discernible text, updates @tanstack/intent to ^0.0.27, updates srvx to v0.11.14, updates @oxc-project/runtime to v0.123.0, updates @clack/prompts to v1.2.0, bumps fastify from 5.8.1 to 5.8.3, updates codecov/codecov-action to v6, updates eslint-plugin-unicorn to v64, updates undici to v8, removes versions from private workspaces, handles React 19 proxy coercion in createInnerProxy, adds trpc-studio to awesome-trpc extensions, upgrades pnpm to 10.33.1, upgrades drizzle in next-sse-chat example, and adds Legora to website logos.

questions.query_text: In the trpc/trpc releases, which release adds server support for lambda response streaming?

answer_support.answer_text: adds server support for lambda response streaming

questions.query_text: Across the trpc/trpc releases, how does the client-related change in v11.3.0 differ from the client-related change in v11.4.0?

options.text: v11.3.0 adds a `localLink` to the client, while v11.4.0 upgrades `localLink` from experimental to `unstable`.
v11.3.0 fixes `httpBatchLink` with a custom transformed object, while v11.4.0 adds TypeScript 5.9 support.
v11.3.0 bumps tanstack packages, while v11.4.0 swaps rollup with rolldown.
v11.3.0 adds lambda response streaming, while v11.4.0 adds 402 HTTP response support.

questions.expected_answer: v11.3.0 adds a `localLink` to the client, while v11.4.0 upgrades `localLink` from experimental to `unstable`.

questions.query_text: In the trpc/trpc release window, order the following release-content states from earliest to latest: (1) a release that adds a `localLink` to the client, (2) a release that upgrades `localLink` from experimental to `unstable`, (3) a release that adds an experimental_encoder option for WebSocket connections.

answer_support.answer_text: adds an experimental_encoder option for WebSocket connections
